citationFallbacks: artifact path plus exact log line
contractTerms.scope: Strike-3 and post-instrumentation fix handoffs only

expectedNewOrUpdatedGuards: A focused library/process prompt regression test or deterministic metadata check that fails if the 3+ hypothesis requirement disappears.
A guard that fails if falsifying observations, log citation by seq/timestamp/log-id, or needs-more-data rejection language disappears.
nonGoals: Do not implement source-code fixes for the timer-overlay example.
Do not broaden the contract to ordinary first-attempt bugfixes unless the implementation evidence shows the canonical handoff surface cannot be scoped more narrowly.
Do not add new SDK dependencies or environment variables.
